---
title: "Matchup Edges"
description: "Qualified hitter and pitcher handedness splits with transparent sample context."
---

::: {.page-intro .matchup-intro}
<span class="eyebrow">Matchup intelligence</span>

# The same player is not the same matchup

Find the largest qualified performance changes against left- and right-handed opponents, then use pitch shape, command, and game context to explain why.
:::

{{< include includes/matchup-edges.html >}}
